stylePrompt: Create a completely original Jelly Style lighting product inspired by translucent color, soft retro-pop geometry, and optical refraction. Use colored glass, acrylic, or resin to make light pass through layered volumes and cast controlled chromatic shadows. The object should feel buoyant, playful, and sophisticated, balancing nostalgic color with contemporary detailing. Ensure heat management, optical clarity, and structural stability are believable.
specificElements: Layered translucent discs producing colored shadows
A rounded acrylic body with a glowing core
A glass gradient from amber to pink
A clear support making the diffuser appear to float
A lens-like curved surface bending light
Stacked jelly-like modules with crisp interfaces
avoid: Too many colors in one object
metalTranslationPrompt: Reinterpret jelly-like softness without transparent plastic: use glossy colored metal, rounded inflated sheet-metal shells, polished reflective surfaces, soft candy colors, and smooth seamless contours.
